p.s: PHP bindings for libstatgrab: CPU, memory, disk, network, and process metrics.
p.d: PHP bindings for libstatgrab (https://libstatgrab.org), the cross-platform system-statistics library. Reads CPU usage, memory and swap, disk I/O, filesystem space and inode counts, network interface counters, page-in/out, process tables, logged-in users, and host metadata. Works on glibc Linux, musl, macOS, FreeBSD, NetBSD, OpenBSD, and Solaris.
